canvas_behavior.browser_shell: review shell scales fixed stage uniformly to fit viewport

generation_provenance.provenance_notes: Generated after human review found N5B top walkway/floor mismatch and insufficient 1,600-person atrium density.

source_visual.source_art_manifest_hash_scope: source_art_manifest may also include a derived_review_proof backlink updated after this rough manifest is stamped; rough proof source-art pixels are governed by source_art_sha256 and local_reference_sha256.

approved_audio.spelling_policy: captions_and_locked_script_keep_live_load; TTS-only phonetic text used lyve to force long-I pronunciation

caption_context.displayed_caption_source: script-locked WebVTT cue text shifted by Challenger-style music-only intro offset
caption_context.final_render_behavior: burn visible rail captions into video frame after rough-proof keep and final render approval

sections.label: The Tea Dance
sections.title: A party under suspended walkways
sections.summary: A public celebration fills the atrium below suspended walkways.

sections.label: The Original Load Path
sections.title: One rod, one carried floor
sections.summary: The original support concept carries both walkways through one continuous hanger rod.

sections.label: The Revision
sections.title: Two rods, twice the demand
sections.summary: The shop drawing split the rod and changed what the fourth-floor box beam had to carry.

sections.label: The Category Error
sections.title: A detail treated as paperwork
sections.summary: A structural change passes through the process as if it were coordination.

sections.label: The Warning Signs
sections.title: Deflection before failure
sections.summary: Cracks, deflection, and inspections never become decisive evidence.

sections.label: Everything Was In Order
sections.title: The system accepted the wrong load path
sections.summary: The documents look orderly after the load path has changed.

living_cover_ambient_effects_layer.replaced_artifact_reason: Repairs prior event-life ambient proof where loose balloons faded instead of physically rising out of frame and did not explicitly constrain colors to the Hyatt table-bouquet palette.
living_cover_ambient_effects_layer.preserved_reason: Intro rail readability successor only; ambient camera flash and balloon-exit palette parameters are unchanged.

end_screen_context.template_precedent: Challenger titleless end-screen overlay; Therac adopted the same three-target static platform geometry.
end_screen_context.background_motion_policy: continuous ambient source drift may continue; YouTube target geometry remains static

review_question: At 01:31/01:32, does the slight background shift ease in like Challenger instead of popping?

viewer_text_policy.end_screen_text_policy: static target geometry only; no text outside right rail

vo_outro_blend_plan.rationale: Carry the Paper Architecture motif under the last VO phrase so the outro enters as a continuation instead of a hard join.

outro_entry_level_match_notes.note: Programmatic level check is supporting evidence; human final assembly review still owns perceptual keep/tighten/reject.

rights_notes.notes: Uses registered Paper Architecture theme assets from the local music registry. Public release remains blocked until YouTube claim/status checks are complete.

audio_pronunciation_repair.issue_reported_by_user: At active proof around 00:02:56, live in live load used the short-i pronunciation; both structural live load references need long-I.

target_occurrences.locked_caption_text: The nut at the fourth floor bore only against the dead load and live load of that structure.
The Kansas City Building Code at the time required walkway connections to support twice the expected live load.

audio_pronunciation_repair.tts_only_pronunciation_text_policy: rendered sentence text used lyve load; captions and locked script remain live load

visual_policy_patch.reason: Browser QA confirmed inherited rail text remained visible during end-screen hold; fixed locally so end-screen geometry is text-free while preserving source art, audio, captions, flashes, and balloons.

rail_opacity_repair.reason_reported_by_user: The right rail for this episode is too opaque below the current scene text.

challenger_staged_transition_repair.reason_reported_by_user: The transition at 1:31/1:32 where the background shifts slightly should ease like Challenger, not pop.
challenger_staged_transition_repair.predecessor_issue: Prior generic smoothing used a broad 3s pre-boundary plus 5s post-boundary blend and did not match the Challenger staged precedent.
challenger_staged_transition_repair.implementation: Source-art base visual state holds previous chapter state for 0-120ms after each story boundary, then smoothsteps visualMix from 0 to 1 between 120ms and 600ms.

publish_readiness_gate.next_action: Record human keep on the final MP4 assembly, verify the source/fact-check packet, then create HTML-first publish readiness before any YouTube action.

next_review_question: Review the final MP4 assembly and reply with exactly one disposition: keep, tighten, or reject.

invalidated_final_render.reason: Final MP4 blocked because the actual full outro starts at voice end instead of fading in behind the final VO.
